config.voxyworldgenv2.title: Voxy World Gen V2 Config
config.voxyworldgenv2.option.enabled.too: Enable or disable chunk generation for Voxy
config.voxyworldgenv2.option.f3_stats.to: Show generation statistics in the F3 debug overlay
config.voxyworldgenv2.option.radius.tool: Radius in chunks around players to generate LOD data
config.voxyworldgenv2.option.update_inte: How often (in ticks) to check for new work
config.voxyworldgenv2.option.max_queue.t: Maximum number of chunks that can be queued for generation
Maximum number of chunk generation tasks running simultaneously
config.voxyworldgenv2.option.save_normal: When disabled, chunks generated only for LOD will not be saved to disk. Reduces world size but chunks will need to be regenerated on restart.
